user.title: Select Data Source
user.description: Smart Plant can fetch plant data from various sources. Wikipedia is free for everyone, Perenual requires an API key.

perenual_setup.title: Setup Perenual API
perenual_setup.description: Enter your API key from https://perenual.com/

plant_setup.title: Add Plant
plant_setup.description: Enter your plant's name and search for its species.

select_species.title: Select Species
select_species.description: Select the best match from the results.

error.no_plants_found: No plants found for this query.
